md.name: headers_basic
md.text:
# Chapter 9

Intro to integration testing here.

## Database tests

We submit SQL to the database and check the results returned.

### DAO

The DAO class wraps the queries.
expected:
Effective-Software-Testing > Chapter-09-Integration > Chapter 9

Intro to integration testing here.

Effective-Software-Testing > Chapter-09-Integration > Chapter 9 > Database tests

We submit SQL to the database and check the results returned.

Effective-Software-Testing > Chapter-09-Integration > Chapter 9 > Database tests > DAO

The DAO class wraps the queries.

md.name: header_pop
md.text:
# A

Under section A here.

## B

Under subsection B.

# C

Under section C only.
expected:

Book > Ch2 > A > B

Book > Ch2 > C
